name: pongo
description: Pong game with Rust + WebAssembly + Cloudflare Durable Objects

scripts.test:all: prettier --check . && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:scanner && cargo fmt --check && cargo check --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && npm run check:diagrams
scripts.build:server: node scripts/write-sentry-config.mjs && cd lobby_worker && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../worker/pkg && cp index.html style.css *.js *.mjs manifest.webmanifest _headers ../worker/pkg/ && cp -r icons ../worker/pkg/
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && node scripts/stamp-sw.mjs
